title: Maya stale context refresh boundary
description: Activates Maya from a package whose freshness window has expired, proving that the report exposes the stale package and refresh-before-external-action boundary.

agent_activation.activation_goal: Review whether any external-facing marketing action is still safe from this package.

capture_response.response_text: This package is stale for external action. I can identify the missing refresh evidence, but I will not recommend publishing or sending external copy until the deal permission and proof-point evidence are refreshed.
